summary: Drip Campaign Reply Context Feature - All tests passed. Backend APIs (send-sms with campaign params, simulate-inbound, conversation with responding_to) working correctly. Frontend UI displays 'Responding to:' context blocks with quoted original messages and campaign badges.
seed_data_creation: Test clients created and cleaned up during backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Drip campaign reply context feature fully tested and working. Test client 'Test Lead John' has conversation history with responding_to context.

send_sms_with_campaign_params.description: Accepts campaign_id and campaign_name parameters and stores them with the message

simulate_inbound_endpoint.description: Creates inbound message linked to last outbound via responding_to field
tests: test_simulate_inbound_with_responding_to_context - Links to last outbound with campaign info
test_simulate_inbound_no_prior_outbound - Handles case with no prior outbound

conversation_endpoint.description: Returns messages with responding_to and campaign_name fields

frontend_responding_to_display.description: Displays 'Responding to:' block with quoted original message for inbound replies
evidence: Screenshot shows 'Responding to:' label with arrow icon
Quoted original message displayed in styled block
Campaign badge shown next to quoted message

frontend_campaign_badge.description: Shows campaign badge on messages from drip campaigns
evidence: Outbound messages show 'Lead Follow-Up Campaign' badge
Badge also appears in 'Responding to' context blocks

simulate_reply_dialog.description: Test tube button opens dialog to simulate customer replies
evidence: Shows last outbound message context with campaign badge
Simulate Reply button submits and creates inbound message

mocked_apis.twilio_sms_sending: MOCKED - Twilio SMS sending is placeholder (no actual Twilio integration)

frontend_components_tested: Contacts.js - Lines 654-660 for campaign badge on outbound
Contacts.js - Lines 922-983 for Simulate Reply dialog
api_js_methods: contactsApi.sendSms - sends SMS with optional campaign params
contactsApi.getConversation - fetches messages with responding_to field
